title: JouTak SMP
description: A simple joutak client-side modpack, extremely useful on JouTak SMP...
body:
**A simple joutak client-side modpack, extremely useful on JouTak SMP**

**[DISCORD](https://discord.gg/YVj5tckahA) [TELEGRAM](https://t.me/+Yr1SIUnVxmY4YWUy)**

**The JouTak modpack adds some resources and features, that improve user experience playing on JouTak SMP. No more needed to update by yourself.**

What is it? JouTak is a quite vanilla-like multiplayer server for our friends and their friends. Since 12.08.2018, we were surviving without wipes, gamechanging mods and plugins. We use server-side plugins only for security and roleplay purposes.

Then why do we need modpack?) Some of our players get used to client-side mods such as maps, schematics, shaders and optimizations. Also some mods connecting to server plugins: voicechat, axiom, etc. And as the server updates on pre-latests versions each 3 months, it becoming very annoying to update all mods by yourself.

_That's why we have this page. Only few clics and new version already installed on your modrinth client. That's why modrinth is cool. Use modrinth_
